title: Calendar and schedule - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomeCalendar and scheduleCalendar and scheduleTake charge of your schedule with daSalon. Manage appointments, team availability, and resources in one place with a flexible calendar built for beauty and wellness businesses.AppointmentsIn this guide, you’ll learn how to schedule appointments into your da Salon calendar.Create appointmentsStart scheduling appointments with detailed client and service information.Update appointmentsMake changes to existing appointments, such as updating service details, changing team members, or adjusting duration to reflect client needs.Reschedule appointmentsEasily move appointments to a different date or time while keeping clients informed and your calendar up to date.Cancel appointmentsCancel appointments in just a few clicks with the option to notify clients and track cancellations for better schedule management.Complete appointmentsMark appointments as complete to finalize the visit, trigger follow-ups, and maintain accurate client records and service history.No-Show appointmentsHelps analyze client reliability, avoid no-show patterns, and plan future bookings better.Delete appointmentsKeeps your records clean without losing important business dataCalendarLearn how to effectively manage and schedule client appointments using the da Salon calendar — including booking, rescheduling, and handling staff availability.Filter by Venue, Staff, or StatusStart scheduling appointments with detailed client and service information.Pick Date RangeSee appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view past or future bookings.Switch Between Day or Week ViewZoom into a single day for detailed appointment slots or step back and see the full week’s schedule across your team.Click Any Appointment for Full ControlManage all aspects of an appointment — from editing and rescheduling to canceling, deleting, and checking out.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness title: Sales and checkout - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomeSales and checkoutSales and checkoutStreamline your front-desk with daSalon. Track sales, apply discounts, manage payment methods, and complete checkouts seamlessly—all in one smart system designed for salons and wellness businesses.Point of SaleLearn how to process client payments, apply discounts, and manage walk-in and booked checkouts using daSalon’s Point of Sale system.Create a saleQuickly create a new sale by selecting services, assigning staff, and adding client details—all from one simple checkout interface.Search & Filter OptionsQuickly find any sale using ID, status, price range, or date.Refund a saleProcess full or partial refunds effortlessly, with options to return services, products, or adjust payment methods.Void a saleRemove an incorrect sale permanently from reports. Cannot be undone.Edit a saleChange the assigned staff or update sale details post-creation.Share InvoiceShare sale receipts via email, download, or view invoice.View Sale & Client DetailsCheck sale history and client activity in detail.Sales-CategoryUnderstand how to categorize your salon services and products for accurate sales tracking, reporting, and promotional strategies.Sales-ServicesTo record and manage all service-related sales like spa treatments, haircuts, or other service offerings, including edits, refunds, and invoice tracking.Sales-PackagesTo handle bundled service offerings like bridal or facial packages, allowing users to sell, edit, refund, or void packages and track client info.Sales–Book A Look To manage sales of consultation or visual preview services where clients book styling previews or consultations before a full service.Sales–Products To track and process sales of retail products such as shampoos, conditioners, and other beauty-related merchandise, including refunds and inventory checks.Sales-OfferExplore how to configure and apply offers like discounts, memberships, and vouchers during the checkout to drive customer retention.Sales–VouchersTo manage the sale of promotional or prepaid vouchers that clients can redeem for services, including tracking usage and handling edits or refunds.Sales–MembershipsTo handle membership plan purchases and renewals, monitor benefit usage, and manage changes such as refunds or cancellations.Sales–Gift CardsTo issue and manage gift card sales, including tracking card usage, expiry dates, and making adjustments like refunds or voids.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness AssociateSocial mediaFacebookInstagramYoutubeLinkedInLegalTerms of usePrivacy PolicyCookie PolicyTerms of serviceCopyright © 2026 da Salon. All rights reserved.Sales and checkoutStreamline your front-desk with daSalon. Track sales, apply discounts, manage payment methods, and complete checkouts seamlessly—all in one smart system designed for salons and wellness businesses.Point of SaleLearn how to process client payments, apply discounts, and manage walk-in and booked checkouts using daSalon’s Point of Sale system.Create a saleQuickly create a new sale by selecting services, assigning staff, and adding client details—all from one simple checkout interface.Search & Filter OptionsQuickly find any sale using ID, status, price range, or date.Refund a saleProcess full or partial refunds effortlessly, with options to return services, products, or adjust payment methods.Void a saleRemove an incorrect sale permanently from reports. Cannot be undone.Edit a saleChange the assigned staff or update sale details post-creation.Share InvoiceShare sale receipts via email, download, or view invoice.View Sale & Client DetailsCheck sale history and client activity in detail.Sales-CategoryUnderstand how to categorize your salon services and products for accurate sales tracking, reporting, and promotional strategies.Sales-ServicesTo record and manage all service-related sales like spa treatments, haircuts, or other service offerings, including edits, refunds, and invoice tracking.Sales-PackagesTo handle bundled service offerings like bridal or facial packages, allowing users to sell, edit, refund, or void packages and track client info.Sales–Book A Look To manage sales of consultation or visual preview services where clients book styling previews or consultations before a full service.Sales–Products To track and process sales of retail products such as shampoos, conditioners, and other beauty-related merchandise, including refunds and inventory checks.Sales-OfferExplore how to configure and apply offers like discounts, memberships, and vouchers during the checkout to drive customer retention.Sales–VouchersTo manage the sale of promotional or prepaid vouchers that clients can redeem for services, including tracking usage and handling edits or refunds.Sales–MembershipsTo handle membership plan purchases and renewals, monitor benefit usage, and manage changes such as refunds or cancellations.Sales–Gift CardsTo issue and manage gift card sales, including tracking card usage, expiry dates, and making adjustments like refunds or voids.

title: Catalog - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomeCatalogCatalogManage all your salon offerings in one place. From services to retail products and packages, daSalon helps you organize your catalog efficiently for both staff and clients.ServiceLearn how to create, manage, and categorize individual salon services including pricing, duration, and visibility settings.Create a New ServiceAllows salons to flexibly add services for different needs and client types. Makes your offerings dynamic and easy to manage.Edit ServiceKeeps your service list up-to-date with changes in staff, pricing, or trends.Delete servicesEasily remove outdated or discontinued services from your menu while keeping your offerings fresh and relevant.Book a lookDiscover how to create curated service combinations for special occasions like weddings, parties, or photoshoots to boost bookings.Create a Book a LookGreat for marketing and helps clients feel inspired when choosing services. A visual approach to booking.Edit Book a LookKeeps your style gallery fresh and relevant.View Book a Look Know which styles are trending and who’s providing them.Delete Book a Lookk Remove old or less popular looks to maintain a clean and updated catalog. PackagesUnderstand how to bundle multiple services into value-driven packages to increase client retention and simplify promotions.Create a PackageClients get more value. You earn more per visit.Edit PackageKeep up with seasonal offers or staff changes.View Package DetailsHelps you track which packages are popular and who handles them.Delete PackageRemove outdated or unused packages.ProductsLearn how to add and manage retail products such as shampoos, conditioners, and styling tools that you sell at your salon.Create a ProductBuild a product catalog that works for both in-store and online selling.Edit Product Adjust for new stock, pricing updates, or changes in availability.View Product Details Helps you track inventory and sales performance in real-time.Delete ProductRemove outdated product.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness AssociateSocial mediaFacebookInstagramYoutubeLinkedInLegalTerms of usePrivacy PolicyCookie PolicyTerms of serviceCopyright © 2026 da Salon. title: Clients - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomeClientsClientsKeep track of your client details, appointment history, preferences, and communication all in one place. Whether you're adding new clients, updating existing profiles, or reviewing visit records, daSalon makes client management simple and organized.Client ProfileLearn how to add, edit, and manage client profiles with personal details, visit notes, preferred services, and contact information—all from one centralized view.Create client profilesCapturing complete and accurate client info ensures smooth appointment booking, personalized communication, and better tracking.Update client detailsEnsures client records stay up-to-date, especially if they move, change contact details, or provide special instructions. View Client DetailsHelps you understand the client’s purchase habits, loyalty, and preferences—perfect for offering customized services or promotions.Add Appointment from Client PageSaves time! No need to search the client again when booking—it’s all linked and ready to go. Add Sale from Client PageTrack wallet balances, issue store credits, and manage client loyalty rewards or points directly from their profile.Block clientsHelps you handle misuse, no-shows, or policy violations. Maintain control over who can access your services.Unblock clientsOffers flexibility. You can easily re-enable clients without losing their history or records.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness AssociateSocial mediaFacebookInstagramYoutubeLinkedInLegalTerms of usePrivacy PolicyCookie PolicyTerms of serviceCopyright © 2026 da Salon. title: Offers - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomeOffersOffersCreate compelling offers to attract and retain clients. Whether it’s vouchers, memberships, promo codes, or gift cards—daSalon helps you configure and manage promotional tools that drive business growth.VoucherSet up service-based or amount-based vouchers to attract new clients or reward loyal ones. Customize validity, usage, and pricing with ease.Create VoucherPromotes prepaid bookings and encourages multiple visits. It builds loyalty and guarantees future business.Edit VoucherKeep vouchers aligned with changing offerings or new pricing strategies.View Voucher DetailsTrack performance and client behavior to see what works best.Delete Voucher Remove outdated offers to maintain a clean catalog.MembershipCreate recurring membership plans with session-based or unlimited services. Offer clients exclusive access, perks, and long-term value.Create memberships Offers elite experience to your loyal clients and creates consistent recurring revenue for your salon.Edit MembershipTailor your memberships to evolving business goals or special promotions.View Membership DetailsMonitor how each membership is structured and where it's available.Delete MembershipClean up expired or outdated membership options.Promo CodeGenerate and manage promo codes for limited-time offers, first-time clients, or seasonal campaigns to boost sales and engagement.Create PromoCodeDrives quick decisions and increases urgency to book. Easy to share via SMS or email campaigns.Edit PromoCodeQuickly adjust dates, codes, or service scope based on campaign results.View PromoCode DetailsHelps understand promo performance and track redemption trends.Delete PromoCodeKeep only valid and live codes to avoid confusion.Gift cardsDesign and sell digital or physical gift cards with customizable values. Ideal for festive seasons, birthdays, and client referrals.Create a Gift CardTo design and launch a new gift card that can be sold to clients either online or in-store. This helps in boosting sales, offering gifting options, and increasing brand engagement.Edit Gift CardTo update existing gift card details such as pricing, description, or venue availability. This is useful when offering promotions, correcting information, or adjusting to business changes.View Gift Card DetailsTo review complete gift card information including pricing, availability, and usage history by clients. This helps salon partners monitor sales performance and manage client queries. Delete Gift CardTo remove outdated, incorrect, or discontinued gift cards from the offers list. This keeps the catalog clean and avoids client confusion.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness AssociateSocial mediaFacebookInstagramYoutubeLinkedInLegalTerms of usePrivacy PolicyCookie PolicyTerms of serviceCopyright © 2026 da Salon. Easy to share via SMS or email campaigns.Edit PromoCodeQuickly adjust dates, codes, or service scope based on campaign results.View PromoCode DetailsHelps understand promo performance and track redemption trends.Delete PromoCodeKeep only valid and live codes to avoid confusion.Gift cardsDesign and sell digital or physical gift cards with customizable values. Ideal for festive seasons, birthdays, and client referrals.Create a Gift CardTo design and launch a new gift card that can be sold to clients either online or in-store. This helps in boosting sales, offering gifting options, and increasing brand engagement.Edit Gift CardTo update existing gift card details such as pricing, description, or venue availability. This is useful when offering promotions, correcting information, or adjusting to business changes.View Gift Card DetailsTo review complete gift card information including pricing, availability, and usage history by clients. This helps salon partners monitor sales performance and manage client queries. Delete Gift CardTo remove outdated, incorrect, or discontinued gift cards from the offers list. This keeps the catalog clean and avoids client confusion.

title: Payment - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomePaymentPaymentEasily manage and track all payment transactions made by clients. From collecting payments at checkout to reviewing payment history, daSalon offers transparent and organized payment handling for your salon.PaymentsLearn how to record, review, and manage client payments—whether they’re made through cash, card, UPI, or other methods. Includes refund handling and receipt generation.Cash PaymentUse when the client pays you physically with cash, and you need to record the transaction manually.Card PaymentFor recording payments made via debit or credit cards using a POS machine at the salon.Online MethodsWhen the client pays digitally using UPI, Google Pay, PhonePe, or Net Banking, and you want to register it in the system.Other PaymentUse this when payments are made using gift cards, third-party vouchers, promo credits, or any other custom method outside the standard cash/card/online flow.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness AssociateSocial mediaFacebookInstagramYoutubeLinkedInLegalTerms of usePrivacy PolicyCookie PolicyTerms of serviceCopyright © 2026 da Salon. All rights reserved.PaymentEasily manage and track all payment transactions made by clients. From collecting payments at checkout to reviewing payment history, daSalon offers transparent and organized payment handling for your salon.PaymentsLearn how to record, review, and manage client payments—whether they’re made through cash, card, UPI, or other methods. Includes refund handling and receipt generation.Cash PaymentUse when the client pays you physically with cash, and you need to record the transaction manually.Card PaymentFor recording payments made via debit or credit cards using a POS machine at the salon.Online MethodsWhen the client pays digitally using UPI, Google Pay, PhonePe, or Net Banking, and you want to register it in the system.Other PaymentUse this when payments are made using gift cards, third-party vouchers, promo credits, or any other custom method outside the standard cash/card/online flow.

title: Promote - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomePromotePromoteBoost your salon’s visibility and attract new clients with daSalon’s promotion tools. From social sharing to running ads, we help you market smarter and grow faster.Get FeaturedIn this guide, you’ll learn how to schedule appointments into your da Salon calendar.Add a Get Featured RequestTo increase visibility and attract more bookings by promoting your salon on da Salon's spotlight section.Approved StatusConfirms your campaign is live, so clients start seeing your venue immediately.Completed Status Indicates the featured listing period has ended—helps analyze results and plan future campaigns.Pending StatusLets you plan promotions in advance, ensuring a smooth start when the time comes.In Progress Status Notifies that your venue is actively featured and benefiting from increased client visibility.Easy ShareShare your salon’s profile, offers, or services directly to WhatsApp, Instagram, or other platforms with auto-generated promotional links and creatives.Create Easy Share LinkTo quickly generate links clients can use to book services—ideal for WhatsApp, SMS, or Instagram.Use Easy Share Link/QRMakes it easy to promote your salon offline and online with scannable, sharable codes.Creative StudioAccess ready-made editable templates for flyers, banners, and social media posts to promote your services and campaigns effectively.Create New TemplateAllows you to launch a campaign from scratch or a template without hiring a designer.Edit TemplateGives full creative control to personalize campaigns and reflect your brand style.Download or ShareMakes it easy to publish your creatives across platforms for maximum reach.Message CenterCommunicate with your clients through SMS, WhatsApp, or email campaigns. Send reminders, promotions, and announcements all from one place.Client EngagementAutomatically send greetings and welcome messages to clients on special occasions.Appointment Updates – Client Automatically inform clients about appointment status like cancellation, rescheduling, confirmation, and reminders.Appointment Updates – PartnerNotify staff about new bookings, cancellations, or rescheduled appointments.Sales Update – PartnerNotify salon staff when a client purchases a gift card, voucher, or membership.Sales Update – Client Notify clients when they purchase an item like a voucher, gift card, or membership.Expiry Reminders – Client Remind clients when their gift cards, vouchers, or memberships are nearing expiry.Campaign MessagesLaunch promotional campaigns for services, offers, and products to a targeted audience.Ad ManagerRun targeted ads for your salon directly through daSalon. Choose platforms, set budgets, and track performance—all simplified for salon owners.Add AdRun targeted social media ads directly from your salon dashboard—no need for external tools.View Ad DetailsHelps monitor your ad's performance so you can refine strategy and maximize ROI.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness AssociateSocial mediaFacebookInstagramYoutubeLinkedInLegalTerms of usePrivacy PolicyCookie PolicyTerms of serviceCopyright © 2026 da Salon. All rights reserved.PromoteBoost your salon’s visibility and attract new clients with daSalon’s promotion tools. From social sharing to running ads, we help you market smarter and grow faster.Get FeaturedIn this guide, you’ll learn how to schedule appointments into your da Salon calendar.Add a Get Featured RequestTo increase visibility and attract more bookings by promoting your salon on da Salon's spotlight section.Approved StatusConfirms your campaign is live, so clients start seeing your venue immediately.Completed Status Indicates the featured listing period has ended—helps analyze results and plan future campaigns.Pending StatusLets you plan promotions in advance, ensuring a smooth start when the time comes.In Progress Status Notifies that your venue is actively featured and benefiting from increased client visibility.Easy ShareShare your salon’s profile, offers, or services directly to WhatsApp, Instagram, or other platforms with auto-generated promotional links and creatives.Create Easy Share LinkTo quickly generate links clients can use to book services—ideal for WhatsApp, SMS, or Instagram.Use Easy Share Link/QRMakes it easy to promote your salon offline and online with scannable, sharable codes.Creative StudioAccess ready-made editable templates for flyers, banners, and social media posts to promote your services and campaigns effectively.Create New TemplateAllows you to launch a campaign from scratch or a template without hiring a designer.Edit TemplateGives full creative control to personalize campaigns and reflect your brand style.Download or ShareMakes it easy to publish your creatives across platforms for maximum reach.Message CenterCommunicate with your clients through SMS, WhatsApp, or email campaigns. Send reminders, promotions, and announcements all from one place.Client EngagementAutomatically send greetings and welcome messages to clients on special occasions.Appointment Updates – Client Automatically inform clients about appointment status like cancellation, rescheduling, confirmation, and reminders.Appointment Updates – PartnerNotify staff about new bookings, cancellations, or rescheduled appointments.Sales Update – PartnerNotify salon staff when a client purchases a gift card, voucher, or membership.Sales Update – Client Notify clients when they purchase an item like a voucher, gift card, or membership.Expiry Reminders – Client Remind clients when their gift cards, vouchers, or memberships are nearing expiry.Campaign MessagesLaunch promotional campaigns for services, offers, and products to a targeted audience.Ad ManagerRun targeted ads for your salon directly through daSalon. Choose platforms, set budgets, and track performance—all simplified for salon owners.Add AdRun targeted social media ads directly from your salon dashboard—no need for external tools.View Ad DetailsHelps monitor your ad's performance so you can refine strategy and maximize ROI.

title: Settings - Documentation
content: Toggle SidebarHomeSettingsSettingsConfigure and personalize your salon account settings. From business hours and venue details to tax settings and notification preferences, daSalon gives you full control over your setup.Settings-VenueManage your salon’s basic profile including name, address, contact info, business hours, and logo to ensure clients see accurate, up-to-date information.Add venueSet up a dedicated workspace for your salon or business in just a few clicks. Customize it with your branding, team, and service offerings to start managing operations from day oneEdit venueEasily edit your salon name, contact information, business category, and other key details to keep your profile accurate and professional across client touchpoints.View venue Adjust your business hours anytime to reflect seasonal changes, staff availability, or special events. Ensure clients can always book at the right times.Venue Monthly TargetSet and monitor monthly revenue or performance goals for your venue to stay aligned with your business objectives and track progress easily.View TargetsMonitor performance goals set for team members or services. Get insights into target achievements, progress, and areas that need attention to improve salon efficiency.Update TargetsModify existing performance targets for staff or services based on new business objectives. Keep your team aligned with updated goals and expectations.Add TargetDefine new sales or service-based targets for staff or departments to boost motivation and track progress effectively over time.Venue SubscriptionsView or manage subscription plans associated with your venue to ensure uninterrupted access to daSalon’s services and features.Buy SubscriptionExplore and purchase the right subscription plan tailored to your salon’s needs. Unlock access to premium features that enhance client management, reporting, and overall business efficiency.View SubscriptionCheck your current subscription status, plan details, and renewal dates. Easily track what features are included and when your subscription is due for renewal or upgrade.Billing & Business ManagementConfigure your billing, business, and tax details to ensure compliance and efficient financial operations across your salon branches.Billing DetailsAdd and manage your billing information such as legal name, address, and contact number for invoices and receipts. Keeping billing details updated ensures accurate financial documentation and smoother transactions.Business DetailsUpdate your salon’s core information like name, contact info, business type, and operating hours. Keeping your business profile accurate helps maintain trust and professionalism across client interactions.Tax SettingsConfigure your tax preferences such as GST or VAT based on your location and business model. Enable or disable tax collection for online and offline services to comply with local regulations.Booking SettingsControl your online booking preferences such as lead time, rescheduling rules, and slot visibility to match your operational flow.Online Booking RulesDefine how clients can book your services online by setting up rules such as lead time, cancellation limits, buffer times, and more. Ensure a smooth and controlled booking experience tailored to your business needs.Promotion ManagementCustomize client engagement strategies using birthday and anniversary promotions and gift cards to drive retention and loyalty.Birthday PromotionsCreate personalized birthday offers to surprise your clients on their special day. Boost loyalty and increase repeat visits with automated birthday campaigns.Anniversary PromotionsCelebrate client relationship milestones with exclusive anniversary deals. Learn how to configure automated messages and rewards to drive long-term retention.Gift CardDesign and sell digital or printable gift cards that clients can purchase for friends and family. Learn how to set value, customize templates, and track sales.WalletManage your daSalon wallet including transactions, venue-level balances, and fund transfers to enable smooth financial tracking and management.Main Wallet OverviewGet a complete view of your total balance across all venues. Use the Main Wallet to manage funds, make purchases, and track transactions across the platform.View Wallet DetailsLearn how to access detailed transaction history and balance breakdowns, including credit, debit, and transfer records for better financial clarity.Venue WalletsEach venue has its own wallet to manage earnings individually. Discover how to view, use, or transfer funds from venue-level wallets to the main account.Send MoneyTransfer funds between your venue wallet and main wallet instantly. This helps streamline promo purchases, payouts, and wallet-based transactions.WithdrawWithdraw available funds from your Main Wallet directly to your registered bank account. Learn about withdrawal limits, timings, and processing steps.Deposit FundsTop-up your Main Wallet to make promotional purchases, run campaigns, or transfer funds to venue wallets. Accepts UPI, net banking, and card payments.Contact UsHelp & SupportBlogsBecome our Business Associateda Salon Platformsda Salon Partnerda Salon Connectda Salon MarketBusiness AssociateSocial mediaFacebookInstagramYoutubeLinkedInLegalTerms of usePrivacy PolicyCookie PolicyTerms of serviceCopyright © 2026 da Salon. title: Create Appointment
content: Learn how to start scheduling appointments with detailed client and service information in your daSalon calendar.

title: Edit Appointment
content: Make changes to existing appointments, such as updating service details, changing team members, or adjusting duration.

title: Reschedule Appointment
content: Easily move appointments to a different date or time while keeping clients informed and your calendar up to date.

title: Cancel Appointment
content: Cancel appointments in just a few clicks with the option to notify clients and track cancellations for better management.

title: Complete Appointment
content: Mark appointments as complete to finalize visits, trigger follow-ups, and maintain accurate client records.

title: No-Show Appointment
content: Help analyze client reliability and avoid no-show patterns by marking missed appointments.

title: Delete Appointment
content: Keep your records clean by deleting incorrect or unnecessary appointment entries without losing important data.

title: Calendar Filter
content: Filter your calendar by Venue, Staff, or Status to find specific appointments and manage your schedule with precision.

title: Calendar Date Range
content: See appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view bookings.

title: Day or Week View
content: Zoom into a single day for detailed slots or step back and see the full week’s schedule across your team.

title: Appointment Control
content: Manage all aspects of an appointment — from editing and rescheduling to canceling, deleting, and checking out.

title: Create a Sale
content: Quickly create a new sale by selecting services, assigning staff, and adding client details at checkout.

title: Search and Filter Sales
content: Quickly find any sale using ID, status, price range, or date in the Point of Sale system.

title: Refund a Sale
content: Process full or partial refunds effortlessly, with options to return services, products, or adjust payments.

title: Void a Sale
content: Remove an incorrect sale permanently from reports. This action cannot be undone.

title: Edit a Sale
content: Change the assigned staff or update sale details post-creation for accurate record keeping.

title: Share Invoice
content: Share sale receipts via email, download PDF, or view invoices directly from the sales dashboard.

title: View Sale & Client Details
content: Check sale history, payment methods, and specific client activity details for any transaction.

title: Service Sales
content: Record and manage all service-related sales like spa treatments, haircuts, and other offerings.

title: Package Sales
content: Handle bundled service offerings like bridal or facial packages, allowing you to sell and track packages easily.

title: Book a Look Sales
content: Manage sales for consultation or visual preview services where clients book styling previews before a full service.

title: Product Sales
content: Track and process sales of retail products such as shampoos, conditioners, and other beauty merchandise.

title: Voucher Sales
content: Manage the sale of promotional or prepaid vouchers that clients can redeem for salon services.

title: Membership Sales
content: Handle membership plan purchases and renewals, and monitor benefit usage for your loyal clients.

title: Gift Card Sales
content: Issue and manage gift card sales, including tracking usage, expiry dates, and making adjustments.
